label: Today's Thought
text: Life wasn't meant to be rushed.

label: Today's Thought
text: Everything passes — so pay attention.

label: Today's Thought
text: The sea forgives nothing and asks for little.

label: Today's Thought
text: Slow down. The terrace will still be there.

label: Today's Thought
text: Happiness is a long lunch in the shade.

label: Today's Thought
text: Walk first. Worry later.

label: Today's Thought
text: The afternoon belongs to no one but you.

label: Today's Thought
text: Salt on your skin, nowhere to be.

label: Today's Thought
text: Some doors only open after sunset.

label: Today's Thought
text: Espresso is a pause disguised as a drink.

label: Today's Thought
text: The best plans are the ones you abandon.

label: Today's Thought
text: Light changes everything at golden hour.

label: Today's Thought
text: Eat seasonally. Live accordingly.

label: Today's Thought
text: The harbour teaches patience.

label: Today's Thought
text: Silence is a luxury the coast gives freely.

label: Today's Thought
text: What matters is who you share the table with.

label: Today's Thought
text: Let the evening stretch. Morning can wait.

label: Today's Thought
text: Beauty is rarely in a hurry.

label: Today's Thought
text: The Mediterranean runs on conversation.

label: Today's Thought
text: A swim fixes more than a meeting.

label: Today's Thought
text: Tutto passa — even this perfect moment.

label: Today's Thought
text: Leave room for the unplanned terrace.

label: Today's Thought
text: The old town knows what the map forgets.

label: Today's Thought
text: Warm stone, cool wine, no agenda.

label: Today's Thought
text: Presence is the real luxury.

label: Today's Thought
text: The horizon line is a daily reminder to breathe.

label: Today's Thought
text: Dolce far niente — sweetness in doing nothing.

label: Today's Thought
text: Arrive hungry. Leave grateful.

label: Today's Thought
text: The best view is the one you walk to.

label: Today's Thought
text: Time bends near the water.
